meta.title: BD Property Hub — Property for Bangladesh, worldwide
meta.description: Buy, rent, and co-own verified property across Bangladesh. Built for expatriates and local buyers, with every deal brokered by our team.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your listings and saved properties.
auth.registerSubtitle: Buy, rent, or co-own verified property across Bangladesh — from anywhere.
auth.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errorEmailExists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.errorNetwork: Can't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
auth.errorUnexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.errorCodeInvalid: That code isn't right. Check your email and try again.
auth.verifyCodeSubtitle: We sent a verification code to your email. Enter it below to finish creating your account.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
auth.forgotSent: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a link to reset the password. Check your inbox, and your spam folder just in case.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
auth.resetDone: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with it.
auth.resetInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one below.
auth.verifyFooter: Verifying helps keep your account secure.
auth.verifySuccess: Your email is verified. Your account is all set.
auth.verifyInvalid: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
auth.verifyResendPrompt: Enter your email to get a new verification link.
auth.verifyResent: If an account exists for that email and still needs verifying, a new link is on its way.

dashboard.errorBody: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Here's your account at a glance. Listings and saved properties are coming next.

listings.becomeSellerTitle: Start selling on BD Property Hub
listings.becomeSellerBody: Switch on seller access to create and manage property listings.
listings.becomeSellerError: Couldn't enable seller access. Please try again.
listings.createDescription: Start with the basics — you can add photos, pricing, and details before submitting for review.
listings.createError: Couldn't create the draft. Please try again.
listings.submitError: Couldn't submit the listing. Please try again.
listings.submitIncomplete: Add a {missing} before you can submit this listing.
listings.submitNeedsVerification: Complete seller verification before you can submit listings for review.
listings.empty: No listings yet. Create your first draft above.
listings.priceInvalid: Enter the price as a whole number, with no commas.
listings.geoLoadError: Couldn't load locations. Please try again.
listings.pinPrivacyNote: Click the map to mark your property's exact spot. Buyers never see this exact point — the public map shows only an approximate area nearby.
listings.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the property — condition, nearby landmarks, and what makes it stand out.
listings.countInvalid: Rooms and washrooms must be whole numbers.
listings.sizeInvalid: Area and land size must be valid numbers.
listings.saveError: Couldn't save the details. Please try again.

photos.title: Photos
photos.tooLarge: Each image must be 10 MB or smaller.
photos.wrongType: Please choose a JPG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC image.
photos.uploadError: Couldn't upload the photo. Please try again.
photos.updateError: Couldn't update the photos. Please try again.

listings.withdrawConfirm: Withdraw this listing? It will be archived and removed from public search. This can't be undone.
listings.withdrawError: Couldn't withdraw the listing. Please try again.
listings.restoreError: Couldn't restore the listing. Please try again.

saved.cardDescription: Properties you've saved while browsing. Remove any you're no longer interested in.
saved.empty: No saved properties yet. Tap the heart on any listing to save it here.
saved.removeError: Couldn't remove this property. Please try again.

verification.cardDescription: Get verified before your listings can be submitted for review and go public.
verification.unverified: You're not verified yet. Request verification to start publishing listings.
verification.pending: Your verification request is under review. We'll update this once it's decided.
verification.verified: Your seller account is verified — you can submit listings for review.
verification.requestError: Couldn't send your request. Please try again.

verificationQueue.queueDescription: Approve or reject sellers who have requested verification.
verificationQueue.empty: No sellers are waiting for verification.
verificationQueue.reasonRequired: Please enter a reason to reject.
verificationQueue.approveError: Couldn't approve the seller. Please try again.
verificationQueue.rejectError: Couldn't reject the seller. Please try again.

moderation.queueDescription: Approve or reject listings submitted by sellers.
moderation.empty: Nothing waiting for review right now.
moderation.reasonRequired: Please enter a reason to reject.
moderation.approveError: Couldn't approve the listing. Please try again.
moderation.rejectError: Couldn't reject the listing. Please try again.
moderation.removedDescription: Listings staff have taken down. Reinstate one to return it to the public catalog.
moderation.reinstateError: Couldn't reinstate the listing. Please try again.

adminCta.title: Admin dashboard
adminCta.subtitle: Analytics, user management, and the review queues.

catalog.title: Browse properties
catalog.subtitle: Verified listings across Bangladesh, every deal brokered by our team.
catalog.loadError: Couldn't load properties. Please try again.
catalog.empty: No properties are listed yet. Please check back soon.
catalog.emptyFiltered: No properties match these filters. Try widening your search.

filters.title: Filters
filters.priceError: Enter prices as whole numbers, with no commas.
filters.rangeError: Min price can't be higher than max price.
filters.geoError: Couldn't load districts. You can still filter by the other options.

catalog.detailLoadError: Couldn't load this property. Please try again.
catalog.notFound: This property is no longer available.
catalog.mapApproximateNote: For the seller's privacy this map shows an approximate area, not the exact address. The exact location is shared directly once you're in touch.

admin.panelDescription: Remove this listing from the public catalog if it breaks the rules. You can reinstate it later from the moderation dashboard.
admin.reasonRequired: Please enter a reason for removal.
admin.takedownError: Couldn't remove the listing. Please try again.
admin.removedConfirmation: This listing has been removed from the public catalog.

save.error: Couldn't update your saved properties. Please try again.

home.headline: Find property in Bangladesh
home.subhead: Land, apartments, and commercial space — every listing verified and every deal brokered by our team, in English and Bangla.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search by area, city, or district

admin.errorBody: We couldn't load the admin dashboard. Please try again.

admin.overviewSubtitle: A live snapshot of users, listings, and the review queues.

charts.visitorsComingSoon: Website visitor analytics arrives with first-party event tracking.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Search accounts, manage access, and assign roles.
users.loadError: Couldn't load users. Please try again.
users.actionError: That action didn't go through. Please try again.
users.notSelf: You can't change your own account here.
